arts.ttl: Leeds: Ampadu blow opens door for Wöber in April
arts.sum: Leeds United are likely to be without Ethan Ampadu for the remainder of the season after knee ligament surgery was confirmed for the captain, but Max Wöber might be looking to fill the void in a month’s time when he’s back to fitness. A knee injury was confirmed by Farke, then post-match revealed to be one that required surgery after ligament damage:

arts.ttl: Leeds: 18-y/o talent Rory Mahady making progress
arts.sum: Leeds United’s win over Sheffield United on Monday was all about the first team’s push for promotion, but it will have been a great experience for U21 ‘keeper Rory Mahady, travelling in a matchday squad for the first time. Rory Mahady travels with Leeds senior squad for first time

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs West Brom on TV today? Channel, live stream and kick-off time
arts.sum: With Sky Sports broadcasting the match, Leeds vs West Brom is also available to live stream. The match will be broadcast live on Sky Sports Football (Sky channel 403), with coverage starting at 11am, approximately 90 minutes before kick-off.

arts.ttl: 49ers Enterprises given fresh Leeds United transfer reminder amid Premier League club's woes - Isaac Johnson
arts.sum: If Leicester had the strongest squad last season and are struggling in the Premier League after splashing £73m, it should send a message that even fiercer reinforcement is needed for United upon promotion. Leicester City are on the same number of points but sit below the Tractor Boys due to their inferior goal difference, having lost 11 of their last 12 Premier League games.

arts.ttl: Joel Piroe: van Nistelrooy taught me a lot
arts.sum: Joel Piroe comes into this weekend finally at the top of the goalscoring charts, and the Leeds United owes some of his development as a finisher to Leicester City boss Ruud Van Nistelrooy. Previously at PSV as a coach prior to moving into the Premier League with Manchester United and now Leicester City, van Nistelrooy is attributed with a lot of credit for Piroe’s development as a lethal forward.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Championship predictions including Leeds United vs. West Bromwich Albion
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Leeds United vs. West Bromwich Albion.

arts.ttl: Joel Piroe issues demand to Leeds United team-mates to ensure promotion
arts.sum: Leeds United are five points clear at the top of the Championship after back-to-back comeback wins over promotion rivals Sheffield United and Sunderland

arts.ttl: Leeds United are the best in the country for vital stat, Farke says it’s “deserved”
arts.sum: Leeds United’s last two winning goals have come in the 95th and 89th minute, and their ability to score late in games is not matched by any time in the 92. Leeds the best team in the country for late goals this season

arts.ttl: Harry Gray spotted in Leeds first team training
arts.sum: Leeds United are gearing up to face West Brom at Elland Road on Saturday afternoon, in which a handful of talented youngsters have played a part in Thorp Arch preparations. Included in training were three youngsters in particular, 18-year-old goalkeeper Rory Mahady, a player that appears to be 18-year-old midfielder Rhys Chadwick, and 16-year-old forward Harry Gray:

arts.ttl: Thelwell to leave Everton amid Kinnear, Leeds links
arts.sum: Leeds United CEO Angus Kinnear could be on his way to Everton in the summer, and it looks as though the Toffees are shaking up their boardroom in preparation. CEO Angus Kinnear set to join Everton at end of this season
